Esoterica.Name: Mod_trib_gong1_voidtalisman
Esoterica.Desc: A supreme crafting blueprint of the Black Lightning Dao. The Void Talisman is an artifact of absolute destruction — forged in the space between heaven and oblivion.
Esoterica.EffectDesc: [size=10][color=#D06508]Acquire the crafting method of Legacy Artifact: \n Void Talisman[/color][/size]
